items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show The Inbetweeners?
items.explanation: Will McKenzie is one of the defining characters in The Inbetweeners.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Vic Mackey.
items.explanation: Vic Mackey is strongly linked to The Shield.

items.q: Which tv show features the character Ted Hastings?
items.explanation: Ted Hastings is associated with Line of Duty.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Rod Serling.
items.explanation: Rod Serling is strongly linked to The Twilight Zone.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Star Trek: The Next Generation?
items.explanation: Jean-Luc Picard is one of the defining characters in Star Trek: The Next Generation.

items.q: The character John Thackery appears in The Knick.
items.explanation: John Thackery is a key character in The Knick.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Sarah Manning.
items.explanation: Sarah Manning is strongly linked to Orphan Black.

items.q: The character Vincent Martino appears in Orphan Black.
items.explanation: Vincent Martino appears in The Deuce, not Orphan Black.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Catherine Cawood.
items.explanation: Catherine Cawood is strongly linked to Happy Valley.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Fawlty Towers?
items.explanation: Basil Fawlty is one of the defining characters in Fawlty Towers.
